---
title: "Phase Plane Explorer"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

Explore the phase portrait of a 2D autonomous system. Type your own equations and parameter names, pick a preset, drag to pan, scroll to zoom, and click anywhere on the plot to drop a new trajectory.

```{=html}
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <div>
    <label style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary);">dx/dt =</label>
    <input id="dx" type="text" value="y" style="width: 100%;">
  </div>
  <div>
    <label style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary);">dy/dt =</label>
    <input id="dy" type="text" value="-sin(x) - a*y" style="width: 100%;">
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <label style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Parameters (comma-separated names)</label>
  <input id="paramNames" type="text" value="a" style="width: 100%;">
</div>

<div id="paramSliders" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"></div>

<div style="display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <button id="presetPendulum">Damped pendulum</button>
  <button id="presetVdP">Van der Pol</button>
  <button id="presetLV">Predator-prey</button>
  <button id="presetSHO">Harmonic oscillator</button>
</div>

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <label style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary);">x0</label>
  <input id="x0" type="number" value="2" step="0.5" style="width: 70px;">
  <label style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary);">y0</label>
  <input id="y0" type="number" value="0" step="0.5" style="width: 70px;">
  <button id="runBtn">Add trajectory</button>
  <button id="clearBtn">Clear</button>
  <button id="resetViewBtn">Reset view</button>
</div>

<div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 420px; border: 0.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden;">
  <canvas id="phase" style="width:100%; height:100%; display:block; cursor: grab;"></canvas>
</div>
<p style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;">
  Click to add a trajectory · drag to pan · scroll to zoom · use <code>x</code>, <code>y</code>, and your parameter names in the equations.
</p>

<style>
#dx, #dy, #x0, #y0, #paramNames {
  height: 34px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border: 0.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--surface-2);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}
button {
  height: 34px;
  padding: 0 14px;
  border: 0.5px solid var(--border-strong);
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  cursor: pointer;
}
button:hover { background: var(--surface-1); }
button:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
.param-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.param-row label { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); min-width: 50px; }
.param-row span { font-size: 13px; min-width: 36px; }
</style>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/mathjs/12.4.2/math.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  const canvas = document.getElementById('phase');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const dxIn = document.getElementById('dx');
  const dyIn = document.getElementById('dy');
  const x0In = document.getElementById('x0');
  const y0In = document.getElementById('y0');
  const paramNamesIn = document.getElementById('paramNames');
  const paramSliders = document.getElementById('paramSliders');

  let XMIN=-6, XMAX=6, YMIN=-6, YMAX=6;
  let DEFAULT_RANGE = 6;
  let paramValues = {};

  function resize(){
    const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    canvas.width = r.width;
    canvas.height = r.height;
    draw();
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  function sx(x){ return (x-XMIN)/(XMAX-XMIN)*canvas.width; }
  function sy(y){ return canvas.height - (y-YMIN)/(YMAX-YMIN)*canvas.height; }
  function invX(px){ return XMIN + px/canvas.width*(XMAX-XMIN); }
  function invY(py){ return YMIN + (canvas.height-py)/canvas.height*(YMAX-YMIN); }

  // ---- Dynamic parameter sliders ----
  function rebuildParamSliders(defaults){
    const names = paramNamesIn.value.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    paramSliders.innerHTML = '';
    paramValues = {};
    names.forEach(name => {
      const val = (defaults && defaults[name] !== undefined) ? defaults[name] : 1;
      paramValues[name] = val;
      const row = document.createElement('div');
      row.className = 'param-row';
      row.innerHTML = `<label>${name}</label>
        <input type="range" min="-5" max="5" step="0.1" value="${val}" style="flex:1;">
        <span>${val}</span>`;
      const slider = row.querySelector('input');
      const out = row.querySelector('span');
      slider.addEventListener('input', () => {
        paramValues[name] = parseFloat(slider.value);
        out.textContent = slider.value;
        draw();
      });
      paramSliders.appendChild(row);
    });
    draw();
  }
  paramNamesIn.addEventListener('change', () => rebuildParamSliders());

  let trajectories = [];

  function getFns(){
    const fx = math.compile(dxIn.value);
    const fy = math.compile(dyIn.value);
    return { f: (x,y) => {
      const scope = Object.assign({x,y}, paramValues);
      return [fx.evaluate(scope), fy.evaluate(scope)];
    }};
  }

  function integrate(x0,y0){
    let f;
    try { f = getFns().f; } catch(e){ return []; }
    let x=x0, y=y0, h=0.03, pts=[[x,y]];
    for(let i=0;i<3000;i++){
      let k1,k2,k3,k4;
      try {
        k1=f(x,y);
        k2=f(x+h/2*k1[0], y+h/2*k1[1]);
        k3=f(x+h/2*k2[0], y+h/2*k2[1]);
        k4=f(x+h*k3[0], y+h*k3[1]);
      } catch(e){ break; }
      x += h/6*(k1[0]+2*k2[0]+2*k3[0]+k4[0]);
      y += h/6*(k1[1]+2*k2[1]+2*k3[1]+k4[1]);
      if(!isFinite(x)||!isFinite(y)||Math.abs(x)>200||Math.abs(y)>200) break;
      pts.push([x,y]);
    }
    return pts;
  }

  function drawField(){
    let f;
    try { f = getFns().f; } catch(e){ return; }
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#c3c2b7';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    const stepX = (XMAX-XMIN)/16, stepY = (YMAX-YMIN)/16;
    for(let gx=XMIN; gx<=XMAX; gx+=stepX){
      for(let gy=YMIN; gy<=YMAX; gy+=stepY){
        let v;
        try { v = f(gx,gy); } catch(e){ continue; }
        let mag = Math.hypot(v[0],v[1]) || 1;
        let dx = v[0]/mag*stepX*0.35, dy = v[1]/mag*stepY*0.35;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sx(gx-dx/2), sy(gy-dy/2));
        ctx.lineTo(sx(gx+dx/2), sy(gy+dy/2));
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
  }

  function draw(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#898781';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,sy(0)); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width,sy(0)); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(sx(0),0); ctx.lineTo(sx(0),canvas.height); ctx.stroke();

    drawField();

    trajectories.forEach((pts) => {
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a78d6';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.6;
      ctx.beginPath();
      pts.forEach((p,i) => { const X=sx(p[0]), Y=sy(p[1]); i===0?ctx.moveTo(X,Y):ctx.lineTo(X,Y); });
      ctx.stroke();
      if(pts.length){
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a78d6';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(sx(pts[0][0]), sy(pts[0][1]), 3.5, 0, 7); ctx.fill();
      }
    });
  }

  function addTrajectory(x0,y0){
    trajectories.push(integrate(x0,y0));
    draw();
  }

  function setSystem(dxExpr, dyExpr, names, defaults, range){
    dxIn.value = dxExpr;
    dyIn.value = dyExpr;
    paramNamesIn.value = names;
    DEFAULT_RANGE = range;
    XMIN=-range; XMAX=range; YMIN=-range; YMAX=range;
    trajectories = [];
    rebuildParamSliders(defaults);
  }

  document.getElementById('presetPendulum').addEventListener('click', () => {
    setSystem('y', '-sin(x) - a*y', 'a', {a:0.2}, 8);
    addTrajectory(2,0); addTrajectory(-3,1); addTrajectory(0,4);
  });
  document.getElementById('presetVdP').addEventListener('click', () => {
    setSystem('y', 'a*(1 - x^2)*y - x', 'a', {a:1.0}, 5);
    addTrajectory(0.5,0); addTrajectory(3,3); addTrajectory(-2,-2);
  });
  document.getElementById('presetLV').addEventListener('click', () => {
    setSystem('a*x - x*y', 'x*y - b*y', 'a, b', {a:1.0, b:1.0}, 6);
    addTrajectory(2,2); addTrajectory(4,1); addTrajectory(1,3);
  });
  document.getElementById('presetSHO').addEventListener('click', () => {
    setSystem('y', '-a*x - b*y', 'a, b', {a:1.0, b:0.1}, 5);
    addTrajectory(2,0); addTrajectory(0,3); addTrajectory(-3,-1);
  });

  document.getElementById('runBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    addTrajectory(parseFloat(x0In.value), parseFloat(y0In.value));
  });
  document.getElementById('clearBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    trajectories = [];
    draw();
  });
  document.getElementById('resetViewBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    XMIN=-DEFAULT_RANGE; XMAX=DEFAULT_RANGE; YMIN=-DEFAULT_RANGE; YMAX=DEFAULT_RANGE;
    draw();
  });

  dxIn.addEventListener('change', draw);
  dyIn.addEventListener('change', draw);

  // ---- Pan (drag) and zoom (wheel) ----
  let isDragging = false;
  let dragStart = null;
  let didDrag = false;
  let viewAtDragStart = null;

  canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    isDragging = true;
    didDrag = false;
    const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    dragStart = { x: e.clientX - r.left, y: e.clientY - r.top };
    viewAtDragStart = { XMIN, XMAX, YMIN, YMAX };
    canvas.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
  });

  window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    if(!isDragging) return;
    const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const px = e.clientX - r.left, py = e.clientY - r.top;
    const dpx = px - dragStart.x, dpy = py - dragStart.y;
    if(Math.abs(dpx) > 3 || Math.abs(dpy) > 3) didDrag = true;
    if(!didDrag) return;
    const rangeX = viewAtDragStart.XMAX - viewAtDragStart.XMIN;
    const rangeY = viewAtDragStart.YMAX - viewAtDragStart.YMIN;
    const ddx = -dpx/canvas.width*rangeX;
    const ddy = dpy/canvas.height*rangeY;
    XMIN = viewAtDragStart.XMIN + ddx; XMAX = viewAtDragStart.XMAX + ddx;
    YMIN = viewAtDragStart.YMIN + ddy; YMAX = viewAtDragStart.YMAX + ddy;
    draw();
  });

  window.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
    if(!isDragging) return;
    isDragging = false;
    canvas.style.cursor = 'grab';
    if(!didDrag){
      const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      const px = e.clientX - r.left, py = e.clientY - r.top;
      if(px>=0 && px<=canvas.width && py>=0 && py<=canvas.height){
        addTrajectory(invX(px), invY(py));
      }
    }
  });

  canvas.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const px = e.clientX - r.left, py = e.clientY - r.top;
    const cx = invX(px), cy = invY(py);
    const zoom = e.deltaY > 0 ? 1.15 : 1/1.15;
    XMIN = cx + (XMIN-cx)*zoom;
    XMAX = cx + (XMAX-cx)*zoom;
    YMIN = cy + (YMIN-cy)*zoom;
    YMAX = cy + (YMAX-cy)*zoom;
    draw();
  }, { passive: false });

  resize();
  rebuildParamSliders({a:0.2});
  addTrajectory(2,0);
})();
</script>
```
